'''Heg''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bundim]]. It was destroyed during the [[Battle of Heg]].

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=Return to Bundim|book=Star Wars Gamemaster Kit|reprint=1}}
